items.title: Nexus CRM for local Indian vendors
items.description: An open-source CRM system built with Spring Boot backend and React frontend. Features real-time deal management, lead tracking, and responsive Kanban/table views with mobile support. Implements dynamic user-defined fields using JSONB PostgreSQL architecture.

items.title:
KissanMart
Decentralized Supply Chain
items.description: A Hyperledger Fabric-based agricultural supply chain platform enabling transparent tracking from farm to consumer. Implements smart contract chaincode, crypto material generation, and Docker-based network orchestration for traceability.

items.title:
SwasthyaNet
Hospital Management System
items.description: End-to-end hospital management platform built with Node.js and React. Combines EHR, billing, CRM, ERP, and user management with seamless coordination across departments like OPD, labs, and pharmacy. Designed for high-volume government hospitals with reliable performance and offline sync support.

items.name: KOTAK MAHINDRA
items.description: Optimized SQL queries and indexing strategies, improving system performance by 20%. Developed enterprise applications using VB.NET and relational databases following SDLC practices. Collaborated with backend and QA teams for testing, debugging, and deployment.

items.name: FREELANCE DEVELOPMENT
items.description: Built full-stack applications using React, Spring Boot, Flask, and PostgreSQL. Developed REST APIs and integrated frontend interfaces with backend services. Published mobile apps on Google Play Store serving 5K+ users globally.

items.name: REAL PRODUCT COHORT
items.description: Collaborated with remote development team to build production-grade applications. Developed REST APIs and integrated with FastAPI based backend and local LLMs (Ollama and Langchain). Participated in code reviews and deployment processes.

items.name: FR. CONCEICAO RODRIGUES COLLEGE
items.description: B.E. Electronics and Computer Science (2020-2024). CGPA: 7.89. Comprehensive engineering foundation in computer science, algorithms, data structures, and software development principles.
